data.biography:
Linda Edna Cardellini (born June 25, 1975) is an American actress. In television, she is known for her leading roles in the teen drama Freaks and Geeks (1999–2000), the medical drama ER (2003–09), the drama thriller Bloodline (2015–17), and the tragicomedy Dead to Me (2019–present), the latter of which earned her a nomination for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Lead Actress in a Comedy Series. She also guest starred in the period drama Mad Men (2013–15), for which she received a Primetime Emmy Award nomination. Her voice work includes the animated series Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated (2010–13), Regular Show (2012–15), Gravity Falls (2012–16), and Sanjay and Craig (2013–16).

In film, Cardellini is best known for her portrayal of Velma Dinkley in Scooby-Doo (2002) and its sequel Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed (2004), and her supporting roles in Legally Blonde (2001), Brokeback Mountain (2005), Grandma’s Boy (2006), Kill the Irishman (2011), Avengers: Age of Ultron (2015), The Founder (2016), Green Book, A Simple Favor (both 2018), and Avengers: Endgame (2019). She also starred in the drama Return (2011), earning an Independent Spirit Award for Best Female Lead nomination, the comedies Daddy's Home (2015) and Daddy's Home 2 (2017), and the horror film The Curse of La Llorona (2019).

data.biography: Linda Edna Cardellini (nacida el 25 de junio de 1975) es una actriz de cine y televisión estadounidense. Es más conocida por sus papeles como estudiante de secundaria Lindsay Weir en Freaks and Geeks, como Velma Dinkley en las películas de Scooby-Doo y como Samantha Taggart en Urgencias (ER).

Linda Edna Cardellini, geboren am 25. Juni 1975 in Redwood City, Kalifornien, ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Synchronsprecherin. Sie wuchs als jüngstes von vier Geschwistern auf und machte ihren Schulabschluss an der Saint Francis High School in Mountain View, bevor sie in Los Angeles Film und Fernsehen an der Loyola Marymount University studierte. Bereits im Alter von zehn Jahren entwickelte sie durch ein Schultheaterstück Interesse an der Schauspielerei und nahm später an diversen Schul- und Community-Theaterproduktionen teil.

Ihren beruflichen Durchbruch hatte Cardellini 1999 als Lindsay Weir in der Kultserie „Freaks and Geeks“ (deutsch: „Voll daneben, voll im Leben“), wo sie eine intelligente Highschool-Schülerin auf der Suche nach ihrer Identität spielte. Im Anschluss war sie in größeren Filmproduktionen wie „Natürlich blond“ (2001) und als Velma Dinkley in den „Scooby-Doo“-Filmen (2002, 2004) zu sehen. Zwischen 2003 und 2009 gehörte sie zum Hauptcast der Krankenhausserie „Emergency Room – Die Notaufnahme“ und stellte dort die Krankenschwester Samantha Taggart dar.

Weitere bekannte Serienrollen hatte sie als Sylvia Rosen in der mehrfach ausgezeichneten Serie „Mad Men“ (2013–2015) und als Judy Hale in der Netflix-Dramedy „Dead to Me“ (2019–2022), für die sie für einen Primetime Emmy Award nominiert wurde. Auch in internationalen Kinoprojekten wie „Brokeback Mountain“ (2005), „Green Book“ (2018), „The Founder“ (2016), „A Simple Favor“ (2018) und „The Curse of La Llorona“ (2019) überzeugte sie mit vielfältigen Neben- und Hauptrollen. Sie tritt zudem im Marvel Cinematic Universe als Laura Barton (z. B. in „Avengers: Endgame“ und der Serie „Hawkeye“) sowie als Synchronsprecherin auf, etwa als Wendy Corduroy in „Gravity Falls“.

Seit 2012 ist Cardellini Mutter einer Tochter, deren Vater der ebenfalls in der Filmbranche tätige Steve Rodriguez ist. Neben ihrer schauspielerischen Tätigkeit engagiert sich Cardellini gelegentlich auf Theaterbühnen und als Synchronsprecherin für Animationsserien und Podcasts.

Linda Cardellini ist für ihr facettenreiches Können und ihre Bodenständigkeit bekannt und zählt zu den vielseitigsten Darstellerinnen ihrer Generation.

Linda Edna Cardellini urodziła się w Redwood City w 1975 roku. Jest córką Wayne'a i Lorraine Cardellini. Uczęszczała do liceum świętego Franiciszka w Mountain View, CA. Później trafiła na uniwersytet Loyola Marymount University. W fimie zadebiutowała w 1996 roku w serialu "Bone Chillers". Jednak dostrzeżona i doceniona została dopiero w 2002 roku, kiedy to zagrała w filmie "Scooby doo". Dzięki tej roli gra od 2003 roku Samanthe w serialu "Ostry dyżur" a liczba prozpozycji gry w różnych nowym produkcjach wciąż rośnie.

Linda Edna Cardellini (25 de junho de 1975) é uma atriz americana.

Na televisão, ela é conhecida por seus papéis principais no drama adolescente Freaks and Geeks (1999–2000), no drama médico ER (2003–09), no thriller dramático Bloodline (2015–17) e na tragicomédia negra Dead to Me (2019-presente), o último dos quais lhe rendeu uma indicação para o Primetime Emmy Award de Melhor Atriz em Série de Comédia. Ela também estrelou o drama de época Mad Men (2013-15), pelo qual recebeu uma indicação ao Primetime Emmy Award. Seu trabalho de voz inclui a série animada Scooby-Doo (2010–13), Regular Show (2012–15), Gravity Falls (2012–16) e Sanjay e Craig (2013–16).

No cinema, Cardellini é mais conhecida por sua interpretação de Velma Dinkley em Scooby-Doo (2002) e sua sequência Scooby-Doo 2: Monstros à Solta (2004), e seus papéis coadjuvantes em Legalmente Loira (2001), O Segredo de Brokeback Mountain (2005) , O Queridinho da Vovó (2006), Vingadores: A Era de Ultron (2015), Green Book: O Guia, Um Pequeno Favor (ambos 2018) e Vingadores: Ultimato (2019). Ela também estrelou o drama Return (2011), ganhando um Independent Spirit Award de melhor atriz principal feminina, as comédias Pai em Dose Dupla (2015) e Pai em Dose Dupla 2 (2017), e o filme de terror A Maldição da Chorona (2019).

data.biography:
Linda Edna Cardellini, 25 Haziran 1975 tarihinde Redwood City, Kaliforniya, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İtalyan, İrlanda, Alman ve İskoç kökenli bir ailenin dört çocuğunun en küçüğü olan Cardellini, çocukluk yıllarında okul piyeslerinde sahne alarak oyunculuğa ilgi duymaya başladı. Saint Francis Lisesi'nden mezun olduktan sonra Loyola Marymount Üniversitesi'nde Tiyatro Sanatları eğitimi aldı.

Kariyerine 1990'ların ortasında "Bone Chillers" gibi televizyon dizilerinde küçük rollerle adım atan Cardellini, asıl çıkışını ve tanınırlığını kült statüsüne erişen gençlik dizisi "Freaks and Geeks" (1999–2000) ile yakaladı. Bu dizide canlandırdığı Lindsay Weir karakteri, zeki ama kimlik arayışındaki bir genci başarıyla yansıtmasıyla eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Bu başarının ardından sinema dünyasında da dikkat çeken oyuncu, popüler çizgi film uyarlaması "Scooby-Doo" (2002) ve devam filmi "Scooby-Doo 2: Canavarlar Kaçtı" (2004) filmlerinde zeki dedektif Velma Dinkley karakterine hayat vererek geniş kitlelerce tanındı.

2000'li yıllarda televizyon kariyerine ağırlık veren Cardellini, uzun soluklu hastane draması "ER" (Acil Servis) dizisinin kadrosuna katılarak 2003-2009 yılları arasında Hemşire Samantha Taggart karakterini canlandırdı. Dramatik yeteneğini daha da kanıtladığı performanslarından biri de, "Mad Men" dizisindeki Sylvia Rosen rolü oldu; bu rolüyle Emmy Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi. Netflix'in gerilim dizisi "Bloodline"da (2015–2017) Meg Rayburn karakteriyle beğeni toplayan oyuncu, aynı dönemde Marvel Sinematik Evreni'ne de adım attı. "Yenilmezler: Ultron Çağı" (2015), "Avengers: Endgame" (2019) ve "Hawkeye" (2021) dizisinde Hawkeye'ın eşi Laura Barton rolüyle izleyici karşısına çıktı.

Kariyerinin en parlak dönemlerinden birini, Christina Applegate ile başrolü paylaştığı kara komedi dizisi "Dead to Me" (2019–2022) ile yaşadı. Buradaki Judy Hale performansı, ona eleştirmenlerden övgüler ve prestijli ödül adaylıkları getirdi. Seslendirme sanatçısı olarak da aktif olan Cardellini, "Gravity Falls" ve "Regular Show" gibi sevilen animasyonlarda seslendirme yaptı.

Son dönemde Ben Stiller ile "Nutcrackers" (2024) filminde rol alan Cardellini, "Friday the 13th" serisinin merakla beklenen "Crystal Lake" adlı öncül dizisinde ikonik Pamela Voorhees karakterini canlandırmak üzere kadroya dahil olmuştur.

data.biography: 范薇，1995年8月13日出生于中国辽宁，中国内地女歌手、演员。2014年4月，参加1931女子组合全国海选；11月3日，随组合发布首支单曲《欢聚时刻1931》；11月27日，随组合正式出道，庆零岁生日。2015年2月2日，随组合在新春佳节来临之际推出了单曲《爱》，希望给在外游子带去满满的爱回家；10月15日，主演的青春校园喜剧片《校花驾到2半熟时代》上映。2016年2月，出演网络青春电影《爱情对赌》。2017年6月，主演科幻电影《猎兽少女队》；7月8日，随组合发布数字专辑《与你的季节》；12月29日，所属组合1931宣布解散。2018年4月，参加腾讯视频女团青春成长节目《创造101》。2019年1月12日，获得第3届金骨朵网络影视盛典年度网络新势力艺人奖。2020年，参演古装爱情剧《花好月又圆》。2022年，主演奇幻都市剧《恋爱角色请指定》。
data.name: 范薇

data.biography: 范薇，1995 年 8 月 13 日出生於中國遼寧，中國內地女歌手、演員。2014 年 4 月，參加 1931 女子組合全國海選；11 月 3 日，隨組合發佈首支單曲《歡聚時刻 1931》；11 月 27 日，隨組合正式出道，慶零歲生日。2015 年 2 月 2 日，隨組合在新春佳節來臨之際推出了單曲《愛在太空》，希望給在外遊子帶去滿滿的愛回家；10 月 15 日，主演的青春校園喜劇片《校花駕到 2 半熟時代》上映。2016 年 2 月，出演網絡青春電影《愛情對賭》。2017 年 6 月，主演科幻電影《獵獸少女隊》；7 月 8 日，隨組合發佈數字專輯《與你的季節》；12 月 29 日，所屬組合 1931 宣佈解散。2018 年 4 月，參加騰訊視頻女團青春成長節目《創造 101》。2019 年 1 月 12 日，獲得第 3 屆金骨朵網絡影視盛典年度網絡新勢力藝人獎。2020 年，參演古裝愛情劇《花好月又圓》。2022 年，主演奇幻都市劇《戀愛角色請指定》。
data.name: 范薇

Ximena Romo Mercado mais conhecida como Ximena Romo, é uma atriz mexicana.

Em 2014 estreou na tv na novela El color de la pasión, onde interpretou uma das vilãs da história.

data.overview: Zhengbin (Heizi), Wang Hui (Li Fei) và Yu Zhenhai (Hao Li) là đồng đội cũ trong lực lượng đặc biệt. Tình cảm của họ như anh em một nhà. Sau khi xuất ngũ, cả ba được biệt đội cảnh sát đặc nhiệm tuyển chọn trở thành cảnh sát đặc nhiệm. Họ đã làm việc trên một biệt phái. Ở giữa, Yu Zhenhai làm bí mật cho trùm ma túy Zhaka (Jin Song). Không ngờ, anh bị thuộc hạ của Zhaka phát hiện và giết chết trong một cuộc giao dịch. Đồn cảnh sát đã cẩn thận triển khai một chiếc khác trong quá trình điều tra. Một nhóm buôn ma túy hùng mạnh do Tan Xiaoshan (do Yang Zihua thủ vai) cầm đầu. Thì ra hai thế lực Tan Xiaoshan và Zhaka luôn muốn độc chiếm thị trường và nuốt chửng lẫn nhau để tóm gọn hai tên buôn ma túy lớn.

data.overview: Jahy-sama, trợ lý của chúa quỷ, là người được toàn thể vương quốc loài quỷ khiếp sợ. Trong một trận giao tranh với nữ pháp sư để bảo vệ vương quốc đang bị tấn công, viên ngọc huyền bí của Jahy-sama đã vỡ, kéo theo sự biến mất của ma thuật và toàn bộ vương quốc. Cô mất đi toàn bộ sức mạnh và bị teo nhỏ thành một bé loli dễ thương ở thế giới con người. Với mục tiêu hồi sinh chúa quỷ và khôi phục vương quốc, cô chiến đấu từng ngày với cuộc sống thiếu thốn, nghèo túng, nhưng cô sẽ không nản chí!

data.biography: Η Κάρα Τζι είναι Καναδή ηθοποιός της σκηνής, της οθόνης και του διαδικτύου. Είναι κάτοχος πτυχίου BFA στην υποκριτική από το Πανεπιστήμιο του Ουίνδσορ, Οντάριο, Καναδάς.
Cara Gee je kanadská divadelní, filmová a internetová herečka. Vystudovala herectví na univerzitě ve Windsoru v kanadském Ontariu.

Cara Gee ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin, geboren am 18. Juli 1983 in Calgary, Kanada. Sie stammt von den Ojibwe-Indianern ab, einer der größten indigenen Bevölkerungsgruppen Kanadas. Sie wuchs in Ontario auf und besuchte dort mehrere High Schools, bevor sie bis 2007 Schauspiel an der University of Windsor studierte.

Sie begann ihre Karriere als Theaterschauspielerin in Toronto, wo sie in über 20 Theaterstücken mitwirkte, unter anderem in Produktionen wie Margaret Atwoods Die Penelopiade und Tomson Highways The Rez Sisters. Ihren Durchbruch erlebte sie 2013 mit der Hauptrolle als alleinerziehende Mutter Lena in dem Filmdrama Empire of Dirt, für die sie beim Toronto International Film Festival ausgezeichnet und für den Canadian Screen Award nominiert wurde.

Cara Gee spielte außerdem die Hauptrolle in der kanadischen Westernserie Strange Empire (2014–2015), die allerdings nach einer Staffel eingestellt wurde. International bekannt wurde sie durch ihre Rolle als Camina Drummer in der Science-Fiction-Serie The Expanse (2017–2022). Aktuell ist sie auch in der Serie Sweet Tooth zu sehen.

data.overview: Dug Days là một series phim ngắn bên lề của phim Up - Vút Bay được chính tay vị đạo diễn đã làm nên thành công của Up - Bob Peterson - chỉ đạo. Bộ phim sẽ tập trung khai thác cuộc sống thường ngày của chú chó Dug sau khi trở về từ chuyến đi đến thác Thiên Đường cùng ông lão Carl Fredricksen. Mỗi tập phim kể những câu chuyện hàng ngày xảy ra của Dug bên hiên nhà, tất cả đều qua con mắt thú vị (và hơi chệch choạc) của chú chó biết nói đáng yêu của chúng ta.

data.biography:
Robert "Bob" Peterson (born January 1961) is an American animator, screenwriter, director and voice actor, who has worked for Pixar since 1994. His first job was working as a layout artist and animator on Toy Story. He was nominated for an Oscar for his screenplay for Finding Nemo. Petersonis a co-director and the writer of Up, which gained him his second Oscar nomination. He also performed the voices of Roz in Monsters, Inc., Mr. Ray in Finding Nemo, Dug the dog and Alpha the dog in Up and in Dug's Special Mission, and the Janitor in Toy Story 3.

Peterson  was born in Wooster, Ohio, his family moved to Dover, Ohio, where he graduated from Dover High School. He received his undergraduate degree from Ohio Northern University, and a Master's degree in mechanical engineering from Purdue University in 1986. While attending Purdue, he wrote and illustrated the comic strip Loco Motives for the Purdue Exponent. Prior to coming to Pixar, Peterson worked at Wavefront Technologies and Rezn8 Productions.

In 2008,  Peterson played the part of Terry Cane, a puppeteer in Dan Scanlon's first feature film Tracy. He also played additional voices in Tokyo Mater in 2008, and the voice of Mr. Ray for the Finding Nemo Submarine Voyage ride at Disneyland Park in 2007. His most  recent job at Pixar was voicing the Janitor at Sunnyside Daycare Center in Pixar's 11th film, Toy Story 3, which was released on June 18, 2010.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Bob  Peterson (animator), licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

Robert “Bob” Peterson（生于 1961 年 1 月）是美国动画师、编剧、导演和配音演员，自 1994 年以来一直在皮克斯工作。他的第一份工作是在《玩具总动员》中担任布局艺术家和动画师。他因《海底总动员》的剧本而获得奥斯卡提名。彼得森是《Up》的联合导演和编剧，这为他赢得了第二次奥斯卡提名。他还在《怪兽公司》中为罗兹配音，在《海底总动员》中为雷先生配音，在《向上》和《杜格的特别任务》中为狗杜格和阿尔法配音，在《玩具总动员3》中为看门人配音。

彼得森出生于俄亥俄州的伍斯特，他的家人搬到了俄亥俄州的多佛，在那里他毕业于多佛高中。他于1986年在俄亥俄北方大学获得学士学位，并在普渡大学获得机械工程硕士学位。在普渡大学就读期间，他为普渡指数撰写并绘制了连环画《Loco Motives for the Purdue Exponent》。在加入皮克斯之前，Peterson曾在Wavefront Technologies和Rezn8 Productions工作。

2008年，彼得森在丹·斯坎伦（Dan Scanlon）的第一部故事片《特蕾西》（Tracy）中扮演了木偶师特里·凯恩（Terry Cane）的角色。2008 年，他还在 Tokyo Mater 中为其他配音，并于 2007 年在迪斯尼乐园的海底总动员中为 Ray 先生配音。他最近在皮克斯的工作是在皮克斯的第 11 部电影《玩具总动员 3》中为 Sunnyside 日托中心的看门人配音，该电影于 2010 年 6 月 18 日上映。
data.name: 鲍勃·彼得森

data.biography:
Robert “Bob” Peterson（生於 1961 年 1 月）是美國動畫師、編劇、導演和配音演員，自 1994 年以來一直在皮克斯工作。他的第一份工作是在《反鬥奇兵》中擔任佈局藝術家和動畫師。他因《海底奇兵》的劇本而獲得奧斯卡提名。彼得森是《Up》的聯合導演和編劇，這為他贏得了第二次奧斯卡提名。他還在《怪獸公司》中為羅茲配音，在《海底奇兵》中為雷先生配音，在《向上》和《杜格的特別任務》中為狗杜格和阿爾法配音，在《玩具總動員 3》中為看門人配音。

彼得森出生於俄亥俄州的伍斯特，他的家人搬到了俄亥俄州的多佛，在那裏他畢業於多佛高中。他於 1986 年在俄亥俄北方大學獲得學士學位，並在普渡大學獲得機械工程碩士學位。在普渡大學就讀期間，他為普渡指數撰寫並繪製了聯環畫《Loco Motives for the Purdue Exponent》。在加入皮克斯之前，Peterson 曾在 Wavefront Technologies 和 Rezn8 Productions 工作。

2008 年，彼得森在丹·斯坎倫（Dan Scanlon）的第一部故事片《特蕾西》（Tracy）中扮演了木偶師特里·凱恩（Terry Cane）的角色。2008 年，他還在 Tokyo Mater 中為其他配音，並於 2007 年在迪斯尼樂園的海底總動員中為 Ray 先生配音。他最近在皮克斯的工作是在皮克斯的第 11 部電影《玩具總動員 3》中為 Sunnyside 日託中心的看門人配音，該電影於 2010 年 6 月 18 日上映。
data.name: 鮑伯·彼得森

data.biography:
吴岱融，原名吴瑰岸，新加坡演员。

80年代新加坡当红小生，曾有新加坡第一帅哥的称号，新加坡作品《人在旅途》至今仍有相当的影响力。1987年，吴岱融来到香港发展，更名为“吴岱融”，成为TVB旗下艺人。《绝代双骄》《边城浪子》《玉面飞狐》《剑魔独孤求败》堪称吴岱融的“经典四部曲”。吴岱融在80年代末—90年代初一度是TVB力捧的当红小生。 1987年底筹拍《绝代双骄》，作为新人的吴岱融有幸与五虎将梁朝伟联袂主演，出演花无缺一角，以白衣翩翩，玉树临风，面如冠玉，文雅俊秀的谦谦君子形象打动无数人心，并因此而一炮走红，至今，仍有无数“花迷”认为：“吴岱融后，不复花公子矣。” 之后1989年吴岱融再次出演古龙名著《边城浪子》男主角傅红雪，换作一袭黑衣的他把身世凄惨，身有残疾，个性孤僻，感情细腻的傅红雪刻画得入木三分，很多人是因为吴岱融而爱上古龙笔下的傅红雪这一经典人物的。同年吴岱融在《玉面飞狐》里扮演的卓不凡亦获得了全面肯定。
data.name: 吴岱融

吳岱融，原名吳瑰岸，新加坡演員。

80年代新加坡當紅小生，曾有新加坡第一帥哥的稱號，新加坡作品《人在旅途》至今仍有相當的影響力。1987年，吳岱融來到香港發展，更名為“吳岱融”，成為TVB旗下藝人。《絕代雙驕》《邊城浪子》《玉面飛狐》《劍魔獨孤求敗》堪稱吳岱融的“經典四部曲”。吳岱融在80年代末—90年代初一度是TVB力捧的當紅小生。 1987年底籌拍《絕代雙驕》，作為新人的吳岱融有幸與五虎將梁朝偉聯袂主演，出演花無缺一角，以白衣翩翩，玉樹臨風，面如冠玉，文雅俊秀的謙謙君子形象打動無數人心，並因此而一炮走紅，至今，仍有無數“花迷”認為：“吳岱融後，不復花公子矣。” 之後1989年吳岱融再次出演古龍名著《邊城浪子》男主角傅紅雪，換作一襲黑衣的他把身世淒慘，身有殘疾，個性孤僻，感情細膩的傅紅雪刻畫得入木三分，很多人是因為吳岱融而愛上古龍筆下的傅紅雪這一經典人物的。同年吳岱融在《玉面飛狐》里扮演的卓不凡亦獲得了全面肯定。
data.name: 吳岱融

Mark O’Brien (* 7. Mai 1984 in St. John’s, Neufundland und Labrador) ist ein kanadischer Schauspieler.

Der aus St. John’s stammende Mark O’Brien begann seine Schauspielkarriere in lokalen Theatern. Seine erste größere Rolle hatte er als Drake 2006 in der Miniserie Above and Beyond. Im selben Jahr war er für zehn Folgen in der Serie You’re It! zu sehen. 2009 hatte er eine Rolle im Film Grown Up Movie Star neben Shawn Doyle und Tatiana Maslany inne. Seit 2010 gehört er als Des Courtney zur Hauptbesetzung der Serie Republic of Doyle – Einsatz für zwei. Im Jahr 2011 folgte ein Auftritt in der Serie Warehouse 13 sowie im Jahr 2012 einer in Murdoch Mysteries.

data.biography:
Nathalie Boltt (born 19 July 1973) is a South African actress known for Riverdale and District 9. Her initial break into acting was in her birth country, South Africa, as Joey Ortlepp on the SABC 3 drama Isidingo from 2001 to 2004.

Internationally, she portrayed Penelope Blossom on The CW's teen drama series Riverdale from 2017 to 2023. She has been seen in the films District 9, Demonic, and the 2005 television remake of The Poseidon Adventure. She also voices the character of DottyWot in the New Zealand children's series The WotWots.

Nathalie Boltt (nacida el 19 de julio de 1973) es una actriz sudafricana, conocida en ese país por su papel de Joey Ortlepp en la telenovela SABC 3 Isidingo desde 2001 hasta 2004.

A nivel internacional, se la ha visto en la película District 9 y en la nueva versión de televisión de 2005, The Poseidon Adventure. También expresa el personaje de DottyWot en la serie infantil de Nueva Zelanda The WotWots.

娜塔莉·博尔特（Nathalie Boltt，1973年7月19日-）是一位南非女演员，以《里弗代尔》和《第九区》而闻名。2001 年至 2004 年，她首次进入演艺界是在她的出生国南非，在 SABC 3 电视剧《伊西丁戈》中饰演乔伊·奥特莱普。

在国际上，她于 2017 年至 2023 年在 CW 的青少年剧集 Riverdale 中饰演佩内洛普·布卢姆。她曾出演过电影《第九区》、《恶魔》和 2005 年翻拍的《波塞冬历险记》。她还为新西兰儿童剧《The WotWots》中的DottyWot角色配音。

data.biography:
Nathalie Boltt (ur. 19 lipca 1973) jest południowoafrykańską aktorką, reżyserką i pisarką. Jej debiut aktorski miał miejsce w jej ojczystym kraju, RPA, jako Joey Ortlepp w dramacie SABC 3 Isidingo w latach 2001-2004. Najbardziej znana jest z powracającej roli Penelope Blossom w serialu dla nastolatków Riverdale stacji CW w latach 2017-2023. Dorastała w Johannesburgu w Republice Południowej Afryki w czasach apartheidu i ukończyła studia licencjackie z aktorstwa i tańca na Rhodes University w Grahamstown w 1995 roku.

W 2005 roku zagrała w Posejdon, remake'u filmu o tym samym tytule, wyprodukowanym przez NBC. W 2009 roku zagrała drugoplanową rolę w osadzonym w RPA filmie akcji science fiction Neilla Blomkampa, Dystrykt 9. Następnie zagrała drugoplanową rolę w nowozelandzkim filmie telewizyjnym Bloodlines, opartym na prawdziwej historii Colina Bouwera, południowoafrykańskiego lekarza w Nowej Zelandii. Otrzymała nominację do nagrody dla najlepszej aktorki drugoplanowej na Aotearoa Film & Television Awards w 2011 roku. W 2017 roku zagrała rolę w 24 godziny po śmierci u boku Ethana Hawke'a. Użycza również głosu wielu postaciom, w tym DottyWot w nowozelandzkim serialu dla dzieci Kitka i Pompon.

W listopadzie 2024 roku rozpoczęła zdjęcia do swojego debiutu reżyserskiego, Holy Days, w Nowej Zelandii. W filmie Jackie Weaver, Judy Davis i Miriam Margolyes grają trzy zakonnice na Wyspie Południowej Nowej Zelandii.

W 2006 roku wyemigrowała z RPA do Nowej Zelandii i wraz z mężem Philem wychowała syna w Wellington. Później wyemigrowała do Kanady i obecnie mieszka w Vancouver.

娜塔莉·博爾特（Nathalie Boltt，1973 年 7 月 19 日-）是一位南非女演員，以《裏弗代爾》和《D - 9 異形禁區》而聞名。2001 年至 2004 年，她首次進入演藝界是在她的出生國南非，在 SABC 3 電視劇《伊西丁戈》中飾演喬伊·奧特萊普。

在國際上，她於 2017 年至 2023 年在 CW 的青少年劇集 Riverdale 中飾演佩內洛普·布盧姆。她曾出演過電影《D - 9 異形禁區》、《叫魂》和 2005 年翻拍的《波塞冬歷險記》。她還為紐西蘭兒童劇《The WotWots》中的 DottyWot 角色配音。

Keiko Kishi (born August 11, 1932 in Yokohama, Japan) is a Japanese actress, writer, and UNFPA Goodwill Ambassador. She made her acting debut in 1951, but is mostly known for playing the main role in Kimi no na wa (What Is Your Name?). Kishi married the French director Yves Ciampi in 1957, and commuted for a while between Paris and Japan to continue her acting career. In 1963 their only daughter, Delphine Ciampi, a musician and composer, is born. She divorced her husband in 1975. Since 1996 she has been a Goodwill Ambassador for the UNFPA. Shw won the award for best actress at the 25th Japan Academy Prize for Kah-chan.

data.biography:
Lee Ji‑hoon (Hangul: 이지훈, nacido el 29 de octubre de 1988) es un actor surcoreano nacido en Namyangju, provincia de Gyeonggi, Corea del Sur. Durante su juventud se interesó por el deporte y estudió Educación Física en la Universidad de Hallym, pero pronto descubrió su vocación por la interpretación. Tiene una estatura de 1,84 metros. Está representado por iNKODE Entertainment.

Su debut como actor llegó en 2012 con la serie escolar «School 2013», donde encarnó a un estudiante conflictivo. A lo largo de los años, ha ido consolidando su carrera en diferentes producciones. En «Legend of the Blue Sea» (2016‑2017) interpretó a Heo Chi‑hyun, un personaje clave en la trama romántica y fantástica. Más tarde, en «Rookie Historian Goo Hae‑ryung» (2019), dio vida a Min Woo‑won, un joven erudito atrapado entre la tradición y el cambio. Su versatilidad le permitió pasar del melodrama («Whisper», 2017) a la comedia ligera («Your House Helper», 2018), y del romance a la acción histórica en «River Where the Moon Rises» (2021).  En los últimos años ha ampliado su registro con títulos como «Sponsor» (2021), «Jinxed at First» (2022) y, más recientemente, «The Impossible Heir» (2024), donde su papel le situó en el centro de la trama. También ha participado en cine, con apariciones en películas como «A Hard Day» (2014) y «Yaksha: Ruthless Operations» (2022).
data.name: Lee Ji-hoon

data.biography:
Adam Williams (born Adam William Berg, November 26, 1922 – December 4, 2006) was an American film and television actor.  A veteran "bad guy" actor of 1950s film and TV, he began his career after distinguished World War II military service as a United States Navy pilot, for which he received the Navy Cross. In 1952, Williams played the lead, a Los Angeles woman killer, in the film Without Warning! In 1953, he was cast as Larry, a car bomber, in The Big Heat. He had a leading role in the 1958 science fiction movie The Space Children. Other notable film roles include the psychiatrist in Fear Strikes Out (1957) and Valerian in North by Northwest (1959).

During the 1950s and 1960s, he appeared on dozens of television series, including the syndicated Sheriff of Cochise, set in Arizona and starring John Bromfield, and Have Gun – Will Travel in the episode "The Reasonable Man". He portrayed private detective and murderer Jason Beckmeyer in the 1957 Perry Mason episode "The Case of the Runaway Corpse." In 1961, he was cast as Jim Gates in the episode "Frontier Week" on Joanne Dru's sitcom Guestward, Ho!, set on a dude ranch in New Mexico. In 1960, he played the role of a sailor hitching a ride in The Twilight Zone season 1 episode "The Hitch-Hiker", where he is picked up by a terrified driver played by Inger Stevens, who is compelled to pick him up so that he may offer protection and safety to her from a mysterious hitchhiker who shows up at various times and places along the road while she travels across country. Many reviewers have cited this episode as one of The Twilight Zone's "10 Greatest" of the series. He had also appeared in the Twilight Zone episode "A Most Unusual Camera". Between 1959 and 1967 he appeared in six episodes of The Rifleman and in four episodes of Bonanza, and in 1961 as Adam in "A Rope for Charlie Munday", in the ABC adventure series The Islanders. He was cast as Burley Keller in the 1961 episode "The Persecuted" of the ABC/Warner Brothers western series Lawman. He guest-starred in an episode of the 1961 NBC series The Americans, based on family conflicts stemming from the American Civil War, and in an episode of the 1961 series The Asphalt Jungle. One of his later roles was in the 1976 television movie Helter Skelter.
data.name: Adam Williams

亚当·威廉姆斯（1922年11月26日-2006年12月4日），美国影视演员。作为 1950 年代电影和电视的资深“坏人”演员，他在二战期间作为美国海军飞行员服役后开始了他的职业生涯，并因此获得了海军十字勋章。1952年，威廉姆斯在电影《没有警告》中扮演主角，一名洛杉矶女杀手！1953 年，他在《大热》中饰演汽车炸弹袭击者拉里。他在 1958 年的科幻电影《太空之子》中担任主角。其他著名的电影角色包括《恐惧出击》（1957）中的精神病医生和《西北偏北》（1959）中的缬草。

在 1950 年代和 1960 年代，他出现在数十部电视连续剧中，包括以亚利桑那州为背景并由约翰·布罗姆菲尔德主演的联合《科奇斯警长》，以及“理性人”一集中的《有枪——将旅行》。他在 1957 年佩里·梅森 （Perry Mason） 的剧集“失控尸体案”中饰演私家侦探和杀人犯杰森·贝克迈尔 （Jason Beckmeyer）。1961年，他在乔安妮·德鲁（Joanne Dru）的情景喜剧《Guestward， Ho！》的“边境周”一集中饰演吉姆·盖茨（Jim Gates），该剧以新墨西哥州的一个花花公子牧场为背景。1960 年，他在《暮光之城》第 1 季剧集“搭便车者”中扮演一名搭便车的水手，在那里他被英格·史蒂文斯 （Inger Stevens） 饰演的惊恐司机接走，他被迫接他，以便他可以为她提供保护和安全，免受一个神秘的搭便车者的影响，这个搭便车者在她穿越全国时出现在沿途的不同时间和地点。许多评论家将这一集称为《暮光之城》该系列的“10 大”之一。他还出现在《暮光之城》的剧集“最不寻常的相机”中。1959 年至 1967 年间，他出演了六集《步枪手》和四集《富矿》，并于 1961 年在 ABC 冒险系列《岛民》中的“查理·蒙迪的绳索”中饰演亚当。他在 1961 年 ABC/华纳兄弟西部剧集《劳曼》的“受迫害者”中饰演伯利凯勒。他客串出演了 1961 年 NBC 系列剧《美国人》的一集，该剧改编自美国内战引起的家庭冲突，以及 1961 年电视剧《沥青丛林》的一集。他后来的角色之一是在 1976 年的电视电影 Helter Skelter 中。
data.name: 亚当·威廉姆斯

亞當·威廉姆斯（1922 年 11 月 26 日 - 2006 年 12 月 4 日），美國影視演員。作為 1950 年代電影和電視的資深“壞人”演員，他在二戰期間作為美國海軍飛行員服役後開始了他的職業生涯，並因此獲得了海軍十字勳章。1952 年，威廉姆斯在電影《沒有警告》中扮演主角，一名洛杉磯女殺手！1953 年，他在《大熱》中飾演汽車炸彈襲擊者拉里。他在 1958 年的科幻電影《太空之子》中擔任主角。其他著名的電影角色包括《恐懼出擊》（1957）中的精神病醫生和《西北偏北》（1959）中的纈草。

在 1950 年代和 1960 年代，他出現在數十部電視聯續劇中，包括以亞利桑那州為背景並由約翰·布羅姆菲爾德主演的聯合《科奇斯警長》，以及“理性人”一集中的《有槍——將旅行》。他在 1957 年佩裏·梅森 （Perry Mason） 的劇集“失控屍體案”中飾演私家偵探和殺人犯傑森·貝克邁爾 （Jason Beckmeyer）。1961 年，他在喬安妮·德魯（Joanne Dru）的情景喜劇《Guestward， Ho！》的“邊境周”一集中飾演吉姆·蓋茨（Jim Gates），該劇以新墨西哥州的一個花花公子牧場為背景。1960 年，他在《吸血新世紀》第 1 季劇集“搭便車者”中扮演一名搭便車的水手，在那裏他被英格·史蒂文斯 （Inger Stevens） 飾演的驚恐司機接走，他被迫接他，以便他可以為她提供保護和安全，免受一個神秘的搭便車者的影響，這個搭便車者在她穿越全國時出現在沿途的不同時間和地點。許多評論家將這一集稱為《吸血新世紀》該系列的“10 大”之一。他還出現在《吸血新世紀》的劇集“最不尋常的相機”中。1959 年至 1967 年間，他出演了六集《步槍手》和四集《富礦》，並於 1961 年在 ABC 冒險系列《島民》中的“查理·蒙迪的繩索”中飾演亞當。他在 1961 年 ABC/華納兄弟西部劇集《勞曼》的“受迫害者”中飾演伯利凱勒。他客串出演了 1961 年 NBC 系列劇《他來自美國》的一集，該劇改編自美國內戰引起的家庭衝突，以及 1961 年電視劇《瀝青叢林》的一集。他後來的角色之一是在 1976 年的電視電影 Helter Skelter 中。
data.name: 亞當·威廉姆斯

Amy Marie Madigan (born September 11, 1950) is an American actress. She has acted on stage and screen, and has received a Golden Globe Award, an Academy Award, as well as nominations for an Emmy Award. She has been married to actor Ed Harris since 1983. 

Madigan made her film debut in the drama Love Child (1982), for which she was nominated for the Golden Globe Award for New Star of the Year – Actress. For playing a woman in a difficult marriage in the drama film Twice in a Lifetime (1985), she earned a nomination for the Academy Award and Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress. She has also acted in Love Letters (1984), Alamo Bay (1985), Nowhere to Hide (1987), Uncle Buck (1989), Field of Dreams (1989), Female Perversions (1996), Pollock (2000), and Gone Baby Gone (2007). After a lack of "meaningful roles", she gained newfound attention for her performance in the horror film Weapons (2025).

On television, Madigan portrayed Sarah Weddington in the television film Roe vs. Wade (1989), for which she won the Golden Globe Award and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award. She also took roles in the HBO series Carnivàle (2003–2005), Grey's Anatomy (2008–2009), and Fringe (2009). On stage, she has acted in the Off-Broadway production of The Lucky Spot (1987), for which she was nominated for the Drama Desk Award for Outstanding Actress in a Play, and a 1992 Broadway production of A Streetcar Named Desire in the role of Stella Kowalski.

Amy Marie Madigan ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Sie ist sowohl auf der Bühne als auch im Film erfolgreich und wurde unter anderem mit einem Golden Globe Award und einem Oscar ausgezeichnet sowie für einen Emmy nominiert. Seit 1983 ist sie mit dem Schauspieler Ed Harris verheiratet.

Madigan gab ihr Filmdebüt in dem Drama „Love Child“ (1982), für das sie für den Golden Globe Award als Beste Nachwuchsschauspielerin nominiert wurde. Für ihre Darstellung einer Frau in einer schwierigen Ehe in dem Drama „Twice in a Lifetime“ (1985) erhielt sie Nominierungen für den Oscar und den Golden Globe Award als Beste Nebendarstellerin. Zu ihren weiteren Filmen zählen „Love Letters“ (1984), „Alamo Bay“ (1985), „Nowhere to Hide“ (1987), „Uncle Buck“ (1989), „Field of Dreams“ (1989), „Female Perversions“ (1996), „Pollock“ (2000) und „Gone Baby Gone“ (2007). Nachdem sie lange Zeit keine anspruchsvollen Rollen mehr erhalten hatte, erlangte sie mit ihrer Darstellung im Horrorfilm „Weapons“ (2025) neue Aufmerksamkeit.

拉蒙·罗德里格斯 （Ramón Rodríguez） 是一位波多黎各裔美国演员，可能最出名的是他在威尔·特伦特 （Will Trent） 中的主角、《外遇》中的本·克鲁兹 （Ben Cruz）、漫威《铁拳》和漫威《捍卫者》中的巴库托、福克斯 （FOX） 的《帮派相关》中的侦探瑞安·洛佩兹、美国广播公司 （ABC） 2011 年翻拍的《查理的天使》中的约翰·博斯利、HBO 的《火线》中的雷纳尔多、 和达米安·奥尔蒂斯（Damien Ortiz）在ABC的Day Break上。

他最著名的电影角色是《变形金刚：堕落者的复仇》中的里奥·斯皮茨、《唯一的伊万》中的乔治、《梅根·利维》中的马特·莫拉莱斯上尉、《极品飞车》中的乔·派克、《洛杉矶之战》中的威廉·马丁内斯和《骄傲与荣耀》中的安吉尔·泰佐，
data.name: 拉蒙·罗德里格斯

data.biography:
Ramón Rodríguez jest portorykańsko-amerykańskim aktorem, prawdopodobnie najbardziej znanym z ról telewizyjnych: tytułowej postaci w Will Trent, Bena Cruza w Romans, Bakuto w Iron Fist i The Defenders Marvela, detektywa Ryana Lopeza w Piętno gangu stacji FOX, Johna Bosleya w remake'u Aniołki Charliego stacji ABC z 2011 r., Renaldo w Prawo ulicy stacji HBO i Damiena Ortiza w Day Break stacji ABC.

Jego najbardziej znane role filmowe to Leo Spitz w Transformers: Zemsta upadłych, George w edyny i niepowtarzalny Ivan, kapral Matt Morales w Meagan Leavey, Joe Peck w Need for Speed, 2LT William Martinez w Inwazja: Bitwa o Los Angeles i Angel Tezo w W cieniu chwały.

拉蒙·洛迪文裏格斯 （Ramón Rodríguez） 是一位波多黎各裔美國演員，可能最出名的是他在威爾·特倫特 （Will Trent） 中的主角、《外遇》中的本·克魯茲 （Ben Cruz）、漫威《鐵拳無敵》和漫威《捍衞者》中的巴庫託、福克斯 （FOX） 的《幫派相關》中的偵探瑞安·洛佩茲、美國廣播公司 （ABC） 2011 年翻拍的《查理的天使》中的約翰·博斯利、HBO 的《火線》中的雷納爾多、 和達米安·奧爾蒂斯（Damien Ortiz）在 ABC 的 Day Break 上。

他最著名的電影角色是《變形金剛：墮落者的復仇》中的里奧·斯皮茨、《唯一的伊萬》中的喬治、《梅根·利維》中的馬特·莫拉萊斯上尉、《極品飛車》中的喬·派克、《異形侵略戰》中的威廉·馬丁內斯和《驕傲與榮耀》中的安吉爾·泰佐，

data.biography:
Andrew Russell Garfield (born August 20, 1983) is an British-American actor and producer. He came to international attention when he co-starred in Never Let Me Go (2010) alongside Carey Mulligan and Keira Knightley, as well as the supporting role of Eduardo Saverin in the drama The Social Network (2010). He gained wider recognition for playing Peter Parker in the superhero films The Amazing Spider-Man (2012), The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014), and in Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021).

He is Jewish on his father's side, and describes himself as a "Jewish artist". Garfield began taking acting classes in Guildford, Surrey, when he was nine, and appeared in a youth theatre production of Bugsy Malone. Garfield made his British television debut in 2005 appearing in the Channel 4 teen drama Sugar Rush. In 2007, he garnered public attention when he appeared in the series three of the BBC's Doctor Who, in the episodes "Daleks in Manhattan" and "Evolution of the Daleks".

Garfield received nominations for the Academy Award for Best Actor for his portrayals of Desmond Doss in the war film Hacksaw Ridge (2016) and Jonathan Larson in the musical drama Tick, Tick... Boom! (2021). He also won a Golden Globe Award for Best Actor for the latter. His other film credits include Never Let Me Go (2010), Silence (2016), The Eyes of Tammy Faye (2021) and We Live in Time (2024). On television, he starred as a Mormon detective in the crime drama mini-series Under the Banner of Heaven (2022), for which he was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Lead Actor.
data.name: Andrew Garfield

data.biography:
Andrew Garfield ist ein US-amerikanisch-britischer Schauspieler und wurde neben seiner Rolle in The Social Network vor allem für die Rolle des Peter “Spider Man” Parker im Amazing Spider-Man Reboot bekannt.

Geboren wurde Andrew Garfield am 20. August 1983 in Los Angeles, doch bereits ab dem dritten Lebensjahr wuchs er in England auf. Nachdem er die ersten Jahre seiner Karriere in TV und Theater verbrachte, wurde er 2007 für Robert Redfords Von Löwen und Lämmern in einer Nebenrolle gecastet.

Die erste Hauptrolle in einem Kinofilm konnte sich der junge Schauspieler im hochgelobten Boy A sichern und bekam dafür mehrere Preise. Der Film handelt von einem jungen Mann, der als Kind ein Mädchen umgebracht hat und sich Jahre später darum bemüht ein neues Leben aufzubauen. 2009 spielte er in Heath Ledgers letztem Film Das Kabinett des Doktor Parnassus eine der Hauptrollen. Auch im TV-Mehrteiler Yorkshire Killer 1974, Yorkshire Killer 1980 und Yorkshire Killer 1983 hatter er eine wichtige Rolle.

Im folgenden Jahr war Andrew Garfield mit Alles, was wir geben mussten und The Social Network (als Facebook-Mitgründer Eduardo Saverin) in zwei heiß diskutierten Kinofilmen zu sehen. Den absoluten Durchbruch im Mainstream sicherte sich Andrew Garfield mit der schwer umkämpften Rolle des Peter Parkers im Spider-Man-Reboot von Marc Webb: Sowohl in The Amazing Spider-Man als auch in The Amazing Spider-Man 2: Rise of Electro war er bislang in der Rolle des Spinnenmannes zu sehen. Auch seine Beteilgung an Untitled Spider-Man Reboot wurde bereits bestätigt.

Neben den Spider-Man-Filmen wurden seine Kinoauftritte jedoch seltener. Erst 2015 kehrt er mit einem großen Film ins Kino zurück: Für Martin Scorsese spielt er den Missionar Vater Rodrigues im Historischen Epos Silence. Darin spielt er einen Missionar in Japan, der zum Opfer von Christenverfolgungen wird.

💥Эндрю Рассел Гарфилд. Родился в 1983-ем году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Рос в семье со старшим братом. Отец работал тренером по плаванию, а мать была ассистентом. Когда ему было 3 года, семья переехала в Великобританию. Учился в Лондонской академии музыкального и драматического искусства. Работает актёром. Личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🏆Главные награды🏆: Тони (2018) [Ангелы в Америке], BAFTA (2008) [Мальчик А], Золотой глобус (2022) [Тик-так… Бум!], Номинация на Оскар (2017) [По соображениям совести], Номинация на Оскар (2022) [Тик-так… Бум!]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Социальная сеть» (2010), «Новый Человек-паук» (2012), «По соображениям совести» (2016), «Время жить» (2024), «Тик-так… Бум!» (2021)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Эндрю большой поклонник "Человека-паука" с детства: в детской комнате у него висел костюм супергероя, а на кастинг он пришёл со своими комиксами
data.name: Эндрю Гарфилд

data.biography: Andrew Russell Garfield (Los Angeles, 20 de agosto de 1983) é um ator anglo-americano. Nascido em Los Angeles, mudou-se a Epsom, no Reino Unido, quando tinha três anos. Após ter concluído o curso de teatro na Royal Central School of Speech and Drama em 2004, iniciou sua carreira em produções teatrais e televisivas, como na peça Kes, pela qual ganhou o Prêmio Manchester Evening News Theatre de Melhor Revelação, e no seriado Sugar Rush (2005). Realizou sua participação no cinema com filme Lions for Lambs (2007) e, ainda naquele ano, seu desempenho em Boy A rendeu-lhe o prêmio BAFTA de Melhor Ator em Televisão.

Andrew Russell Garfield (20 de agosto de 1983) es un actor y productor británico-estadounidense nominado al Premio Óscar. A pesar de nacer en Los Ángeles, se crio en Epsom, Surrey, donde comenzó a actuar en teatros y producciones televisivas. Su debut cinematográfico se produjo en 2007, con el drama dirigido por Robert Redford Leones por corderos. Un año después protagonizó Boy A y por su interpretación ganó un Premio BAFTA.

Saltó a la fama internacional cuando encarnó a Eduardo Saverin en la película The social network, que le valió una nominación al Globo de Oro y BAFTA. Ese año también tuvo un papel secundario en Nunca me abandones, por el cual fue candidato nuevamente al BAFTA y al Premio saturn.

Por lo que respecta al teatro, en 2012 actuó en la producción de Broadway Muerte de un viajante, donde encarnó a Biff y compartió reparto con Philip Seymour Hoffman. Por su interpretación fue candidato al Premio Tony. Su incursión en la producción ocurrió en 2014 con la película de suspense 99 Homes.

Andrew Garfield, né le 20 août 1983 à Los Angeles, est un acteur britannico-américain. Révélé par son rôle dans The Social Network (2010), il accède à la notoriété en incarnant Spider-Man dans The Amazing Spider-Man (2012) et sa suite (2014). Il excelle dans des drames comme Tu ne tueras point (2016) de Mel Gibson et Silence (2016) de Martin Scorsese. Sur scène, il remporte un Tony Award pour Angels in America (2018). En 2021, il émeut dans Tick, Tick... Boom !, obtenant une nomination aux Oscars. Formé à la Royal Central School of Speech and Drama, Garfield est aussi apparu dans Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021). Engagé, il soutient des causes sociales et environnementales.

安德鲁·加菲尔德（Andrew Garfield），1983年8月20日出生于美国洛杉矶，英国电影演员、舞台剧演员。

2005年，出演了第一部电视剧《疯狂的荷尔蒙》。2007年，出演《男孩A》，并获得2008年英国电影和电视艺术学院奖最佳男演员。2010年出演《社交网络》。2012年，在《超凡蜘蛛侠》中饰演主角彼得·帕克，并因此获得第14届青少年选择奖最佳夏日电影男星的提名。2012年，凭借在百老汇复排舞台剧《推销员之死》中的表演获得第66届美国托尼奖最佳话剧男配角提名。2016年，主演了由梅尔·吉布森导演的历史片《血战钢锯岭》，并得到了第89届奥斯卡金像奖最佳男主角提名 。
data.name: 安德鲁·加菲尔德

data.biography:
Andrew Russell Garfield (ur. 20 sierpnia 1983) to angielski aktor. Absolwent Royal Central School of Speech and Drama, otrzymał wiele wyróżnień, w tym Tony Award i British Academy Television Award, otrzymał nominacje do Oscara, Laurence Olivier Award, dwóch Złotych Globów oraz trzy nagrody Brytyjskiej Akademii Filmowej.

Urodzony w Los Angeles i wychowany w Epsom w Anglii, Garfield rozpoczął karierę na brytyjskiej scenie iw produkcjach telewizyjnych. Zadebiutował w filmie fabularnym w 2007 roku w dramacie zespołowym Lions for Lambs. Również w tym samym roku jego występ w telewizyjnym filmie Boy A przyniósł mu nagrodę BAFTA dla najlepszego aktora. W 2010 roku zwrócił na siebie międzynarodową uwagę rolami drugoplanowymi w dramacie The Social Network, za który otrzymał nominacje do nagrody BAFTA i Złotego Globu w roli Eduardo Saverina oraz romansie science-fiction Never Let Me Go. Garfield następnie zyskał szersze uznanie, grając w Spider-Mana w filmie superbohatera The Amazing Spider-Man z 2012 roku i jego sequelu z 2014 roku. W 2016 roku Garfield wystąpił w dramatach historycznych, filmie wojennym Mela Gibsona Przełęcz Hacksaw Ridge oraz w religijnym epopei Martina Scorsese Silence. Rola Desmonda T. Dossa w tym pierwszym filmie przyniosła mu nominacje do Oscara, nagrody BAFTA, nagrody Screen Actors Guild i Złotego Globu, wszystkie dla najlepszego aktora.

Na scenie Garfield zagrał Biffa w wydanej na Broadwayu w 2012 roku sztuce Arthura Millera Śmierć komiwojażera, z udziałem Philipa Seymoura Hoffmana, w reżyserii Mike'a Nicholsa. Za swój występ otrzymał swoją pierwszą nominację do nagrody Tony w 2012 roku dla najlepszego aktora w filmie fabularnym. W 2017 roku Garfield zagrał rolę Priora Waltera w produkcji Angels in America w Royal National Theatre w Londynie, za rolę za którą został nominowany do nagrody Laurence Olivier dla najlepszego aktora w głównej roli w sztuce. W 2018 roku ponownie zagrał rolę na Broadwayu w Neil Simon Theatre, za co w tym samym roku otrzymał nagrodę Tony dla najlepszego aktora w głównej roli w sztuce.

ممثل ومنتج أمريكي، ولد في 20 أغسطس 1983 في لوس أنجلوس، كاليفورنيا، الولايات المتحدة. ينحدر من أصول إنجليزية وبولندية ويهودية. بدأ مسيرته الفنية عام 2005 بالظهور في الفيلم القصير (Mumbo Jumbo). تدرب في الجامعة المركزية للخطابة والدراما. من أبرز أعماله (The Social Network) و(Hacksaw Ridge) و(Silence). اشتهر بتجسيد شخصية بيتر باركر في سلسلة (The Amazing Spider-Man).
data.name: أندرو غارفيلد

2005 年，出演了第一部電視劇《瘋狂的荷爾蒙》。2007 年，出演《男孩 A》，並獲得 2008 年英國電影和電視藝術學院獎最佳男演員。2010 年出演《社交網絡》。2012 年，在《蜘蛛俠：驚世現新》中飾演主角彼得·帕克，並因此獲得第 14 屆青少年選擇獎最佳夏日電影男星的提名。2012 年，憑藉在百老匯復排舞台劇《推銷員之死》中的表演獲得第 66 屆美國託尼獎最佳話劇男配角提名。2016 年，主演了由梅爾·吉布森導演的歷史片《鋼鋸嶺》，並得到了第 89 屆奧斯卡金像獎最佳男主角提名 。

data.biography: O'Shea Jackson Sr. (born June 15, 1969), better known by his stage name Ice Cube, is an American rapper, record producer, and filmmaker. He is known for his roles in the films “Boyz n the Hood,” “Friday,” the notorious remake of "War of the Worlds" and the “Jump Street” series.
data.name: Ice Cube

data.biography:
O'Shea Jackson Sr (Los Angeles, 15 de junho de 1969), mais conhecido pelo seu nome artístico Ice Cube, é um rapper, produtor musical, ator, escritor, comediante, produtor de filmes, e diretor norte-americano. Ele começou sua carreira em 1984 como membro do grupo C.I.A. e depois entrou para o grupo de gangsta rap N.W.A em 1986. Após ter deixado o N.W.A em dezembro de 1989,[2] ele construiu uma carreira solo bem sucedida na música, e também como escritor, diretor, ator e produtor no cinema. Adicionalmente, ele tem servido como um dos produtores da série de televisão da Showtime Barbershop e da série da TBS Are We There Yet?, ambas sendo baseadas em filmes onde ele atuou como o personagem principal.

Ele foi classificado número 9 na lista dos 10 Maiores MCs de Todos os Tempos da MTV, enquanto o próprio Snoop Dogg o elegeu o maior MC de todos os tempos.[3] About.com o classificou o número 11 na sua lista dos "50 Melhores MC's do Nosso Tempo".[4] Allmusic o chamou de um dos melhores e mais controversos artistas do hip-hop,[5] assim como "um dos melhores contadores de histórias do rap."[6] Em 2012, a revista The Source o classificou número 14 na sua lista dos 50 Melhores Letristas de Todos os Tempos.[7]

💥О’Ши Джексон, более известный как Айс Кьюб. Родился в 1969-ом году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Рос в семье со старшим братом. Отец работал садовником, а мать была медсестрой. Учился в Технологическом институте Финикса. Работает рэпером, актёром, сценаристом, продюсером и кинорежиссёром. data.biography:
Wprawdzie Ice Cube wychował się w najgorszej dzielnicy Los Angeles - South Central, ale nie był typowym dzieckiem ulicy. Jako jeden z nielicznych rapperów ma uniwersyteckie wykształcenie i dyplom inżyniera z wyróżnieniem.

Ice Cube naprawdę nazywa się O'Shea Jackson, a urodził się w 1969 r. Już w wieku 14 lat pisał pierwsze piosenki rapowe. Sławę zyskał jako członek kapeli N.W.A. (Niggaz With Attitude, czyli "dumne czarnuchy"). Za sprawą ich przeboju "Fuck the Police" w niektórych miastach w USA zabroniono mu występów. Ice Cube odszedł z kapeli po nagraniu drugiej płyty "Straight Outta Compton". Już pierwsza solowa płyta "Amerikkka's Most Wanted" przyniosła mu duży sukces. W ciągu pierwszych trzech tygodni sprzedano kilka milionów kopii, mimo iż numery z tego albumu w ogóle nie były prezentowane w radiu. W tym samym roku pojawił się singiel "Kill At Will", a zaraz potem ukazała się druga płyta "Death Certificate".

Ice Cube'a można było oglądać w takich filmach jak "Wstęp wzbroniony", "Chłopcy z sąsiedztwa", "Studenci", "Anakonda", czy w jednym z najlepszych filmów w jego karierze aktorskiej "Piątek".

Ice Cube, bürgerlich O’Shea Jackson (* 15. Juni 1969 in Baldwin Hills, Los Angeles, Kalifornien), ist ein US-amerikanischer Rapper, Songwriter, Schauspieler und Filmproduzent. Er war Mitglied der Hip-Hop-Gruppen N.W.A und Westside Connection und veröffentlichte zehn Soloalben. Neben der musikalischen Karriere spielte er in mehreren Filmen mit, unter anderem in der Reihe der Friday- und Barbershop-Filme, die er auch produzierte und bei denen er am Drehbuch mitschrieb. 2016 wurde bekannt, dass Ice Cube als eine von 683 Persönlichkeiten von der Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences als Neumitglied eingeladen wurde.

data.biography:
Ice Cube (O’Shea Jackson Sr.) est né le 15 juin 1969 à Los Angeles. Il débute comme rappeur au sein de N.W.A, groupe pionnier du gangsta rap à la fin des années 1980. Après avoir marqué la musique avec des albums solo à succès, il se tourne vers le cinéma au début des années 1990. Son premier rôle marquant est dans "Boyz n the Hood" (1991) de John Singleton, qui lance sa carrière d’acteur. Par la suite, il alterne films dramatiques, comédies et productions familiales, tout en continuant sa carrière musicale et de producteur.

Ensuite, il joue dans Friday (1995), Barbershop (2002), 21 Jump Street (2012) et Ride Along (2014).

Il est aujourd’hui reconnu comme l’une des figures majeures de la culture hip-hop et du cinéma américain.

Lai Kuan Lin (English name: Edward) is a Taiwanese musician and actor born in Taipei, Taiwan.

He was spotted by K-pop talent agency Cube Entertainment at an audition in Taiwan in 2016. He first rose to fame when he participated in the South Korean survival audition show “Produce 101 Season 2” (2017), eventually finishing seventh, and later becoming a member of the K-pop boy band Wanna One. The group disbanded at the end of 2018.

Lai Kuan Lin started 2019 by making his drama debut, appearing in the mainland Chinese series “A Little Thing Called First Love". That same year he also joined Cube's sub-unit "Wooseok x Kuanlin" and released an album called "9801".

On June 2024, Lai Kuan Lin announced his retirement from the entertainment industry to pursue a career as a director.

Timothée Hal Chalamet (born December 27, 1995) is an American actor.

He began his career in television, appearing in the series Homeland. In 2014, he made his film debut in Men, Women & Children and appeared in Interstellar.

In 2017, he had a leading role in Call Me by Your Name. He later appeared in Lady Bird (2017), Beautiful Boy (2018), and Little Women (2019).

He has since taken on leading roles in Dune (2021–2026) and Wonka (2023), and appeared in A Complete Unknown (2024) and Marty Supreme (2025).
data.name: Timothée Chalamet

data.biography:
Timothée Chalamet é um ator americano. Ele é mais conhecido por interpretar Elio, no filme "Me Chame pelo Seu Nome/Call Me by Your Name" (2017), pelo qual foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Ator; e Kyle Scheible, "Lady Bird: É Hora de Voar/Lady Bird" (2017).

Por "Me Chame pelo Seu Nome/Call Me by Your Name", ele foi indicado ao prêmio de Melhor Ator no Golden Globes, USA; BAFTA Awards; Screen Actors Guild Awards; entre outros, venceu na mesma categoria no New York Film Critics Circle Awards; New York Film Critics, Online; Boston Online Film Critics Association; Chicago Film Critics Association Awards; Florida Film Critics Circle Awards; Gotham Awards; Hamptons International Film Festival; Hollywood Film Awards; Houston Film Critics Society Awards;Kansas City Film Critics Circle Awards; National Board of Review, USA; Los Angeles Film Critics Association Awards; Palm Springs International Film Festival; entre muitos outros...

O ator Timothée Chalamet, que depois que estrelou o longa ‘Me Chame Pelo Seu Nome’, se pronunciou sobre como foi trabalhar com Woody Allen no, ainda inédito, ‘A Rainy Day in New York’. O ator usou seu Instagram para postar um texto em que confirma que doará seu salário recebido pelo filme para três instituições que incentivam a luta contra a desigualdade e a injustiça.

No palco, Chalamet estrelou a peça autobiográfica de John Patrick Shanley , Prodigal Son , pelo qual foi indicado para o Prêmio Drama League por Distinguished Performance e ganhou o Prêmio Lucille Lortel pelo Ator principal destacado em uma peça de teatro .

Chalamet nasceu e cresceu em Hell's Kitchen, bairro de Manhattan, na cidade de Nova Iorque. Filho de Nicole Flender e Marc Chalamet, seu tio Rodman Flender é diretor e seu avô Harold Flender era roteirista. Seu pai é francês e sua mãe descendente de austro-russos judeus. Frequentou a Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School e atualmente estuda na Gallatin.

💥Тимоти Хэл Шаламе. Родился в 1995-ом году в Нью-Йорке, США. Рос в семье со старшей сестрой. Отец работал переводчиком, а мать была танцовщицей. Учился в Колумбийском университете. Работает актёром. С 2025-го состоит в отношениях с моделью Кайли Дженнер

🏆Главные награды🏆: Золотой глобус (2026) [Марти Великолепный], ASTRA (2026) [Марти Великолепный], Critics’ Choice Awards (2026) [Марти Великолепный], Независимый дух (2018) [Назови меня своим именем], Готэм (2017) [Назови меня своим именем]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Марти Великолепный» (2025), «Назови меня своим именем» (2017), «Красивый мальчик» (2018), «Маленькие женщины» (2019), «Дюна» (2021), «Вонка» (2023)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: В подростковом возрасте Тимоти вёл YouTube-канал под названием ModdedController360, где показывал созданные им кастомные геймпады для Xbox. Он раскрасил всего 3 контроллера, заработал на этом около 30 долларов и бросил занятие после просьбы родителей, потому как  весь дом был в краске от баллончиков

data.biography: 出生于1995年12月27日的提莫西·查拉梅(Timothée Chalamet)是一名美国演员。由于出演了美剧《国土安全(Homeland)》第二季中副总统的儿子Finn Walden而为人熟悉。之后又参演过贾森·雷特曼的《男人女人和孩子》，以及诺兰的《星际穿越》。2017年，他在格蕾塔·葛韦格(Greta Gerwig)的导演处女作《伯德小姐(Lady Bird)》和斯科特·库珀(Scott Cooper)的《敌对分子(Hostiles)》担任配角，因此获得了更广泛的认可。此外，他在卢卡·瓜达尼诺(Luca Guadagnino)的爱情电影《请以你的名字呼唤我(Call Me by Your Name)》中担任主角，这一角色为他赢得了多个奖项的最佳男演员奖提名。他是奥斯卡最佳男演员奖自1939年以来最年轻的提名者。在舞台上，查拉梅出演了约翰·帕特里克·尚利(John Patrick Shanley)的自传剧《Prodigal Son》，为此他得到了剧评联盟杰出表演奖的提名，并获得了Lucille Lortel奖的杰出首席演员奖。
data.name: 提莫西·查拉梅

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet (* 27. Dezember 1995 in New York City, New York) ist ein US-amerikanisch-französischer Schauspieler.

2012 war er in der Spionageserie Homeland als Finn Walden, der Sohn des US-amerikanischen Vizepräsidenten, zu sehen. 2014 gelang ihm dann auch im Film der Durchbruch. So spielte er die Rolle des jungen Tom, den Sohn der Hauptfigur Cooper, in Christopher Nolans Science-Fiction-Film Interstellar.

2017 war er in Filmen wie Lady Bird und Call Me by Your Name zu sehen. Für seine Darstellungen erhielt er jeweils viel Kritikerlob und konnte für letzteren Film auch Preise, etwa den Los Angeles Film Critics Association Award als Bester Hauptdarsteller gewinnen. Er ist die jüngste Person seit Mickey Rooney im Jahr 1940, der für einen Oscar als Bester Hauptdarsteller nominiert wurde.

2019 feierte das Historiendrama The King bei den Internationalen Filmfestspiele von Venedig seine Premiere. Chalamet übernimmt darin die Hauptrolle des jungen Königs Heinrich V..

Quelle: Wikipedia

Né le 27 décembre 1995 à New York, Timothée Chalamet est franco-américain par ses deux nationalités, partageant son enfance entre Manhattan et le Chambon-sur-Lignon, en Haute-Loire. Bilingue dès l'enfance, il se forme au LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts avant de brièvement intégrer Columbia University.

Ses premières apparitions à l'écran se font à la télévision, notamment dans Homeland (2012). Au cinéma, Interstellar de Christopher Nolan (2014) l'expose à un large public. Mais c'est Call Me by Your Name de Luca Guadagnino (2017) qui fait basculer sa carrière : à seulement 22 ans, il devient le plus jeune acteur nommé à l'Oscar du meilleur acteur depuis 1944.

Il enchaîne les collaborations avec des cinéastes de renom, de Greta Gerwig (Les Filles du Docteur March) à Denis Villeneuve pour la saga Dune, en passant par Wes Anderson (The French Dispatch) et Paul King (Wonka). En 2024, il incarne Bob Dylan dans Un parfait inconnu de James Mangold, performance qui lui vaut un Screen Actors Guild Award et une nouvelle nomination à l'Oscar. En 2026, il est à nouveau nommé pour Marty Supreme

Timothée Hal Chalamet (27 de Diciembre, 1995) es un actor estadounidense. Chalamet inició su carrera en cortometrajes, previo a su participación en el drama de televisión Homeland. Su debut en largometrajes fue con el drama de Jason Reitman, Men, Women & Children (2014), y ese mismo año participó en la película de ciencia ficción de Christopher Nolan, Interstellar (2014).

En 2017,  consiguió mayor repercusión tras su rol secundario en el debut como directora de Greta Gerwig, Lady Bird, y por su papel como Elio Perlman en Call Me By Your Name de Luca Guadagnino. Por esta última consiguió múltiples nominaciones, incluyendo al  Premio de la Academia, el Premio Globo de Oro, los Premios del Sindicato de Actores y los Premios BAFTA en la categoría Mejor Actor. Es el tercer nominado más joven para el Premio de la Academia a Mejor Actor, y el más joven desde 1939.

En teatro, Chalamet ha participado en la comedia autobiográfica de John Patrick Shanley, Prodigal Son, por la cual fue nominado para el Premio de la Liga de Drama y ganó el Premio Lucille Lortel en la categoría Mejor Actor Principal en una Obra.

Timothée Hal Chalamet es un actor estadounidense. Chalamet comenzó su carrera como actor en cortometrajes y comerciales, antes de aparecer en la serie dramática de televisión Homeland en 2012. Dos años más tarde, hizo su debut cinematográfico en la comedia dramática Men, Women & Children y posteriormente apareció en la película de ciencia ficción Interstellar.

data.biography:
Timothée Hal Chalamet, 27 Aralık 1995 tarihinde New York City'de, sanatla yakından ilişkili bir ailede dünyaya gözlerini açtı. Babası Fransız kökenli bir UNICEF editörü olan Marc Chalamet, annesi ise eski bir Broadway dansçısı ve şimdilerde emlakçılık yapan Nicole Flender'dır. Sanatçı bir aileden gelmesi (kız kardeşi Pauline de bir aktristir) ve New York'un ünlü sanat okulu Fiorello H. LaGuardia Müzik & Sanat ve Sahne Sanatları Lisesi'nde eğitim görmesi, onun oyunculuk yeteneğini erken yaşlarda beslemesine yardımcı oldu.

Profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerine çocuk yaşta reklam filmleri ve kısa filmlerle adım atan Chalamet, televizyon dünyasındaki ilk dikkat çekici rolünü 2012 yılında Showtime dizisi Homeland'de canlandırdığı, Başkan Yardımcısı'nın oğlu Finn Walden karakteriyle elde etti. Sinemaya geçişi ise Jason Reitman'ın Men, Women & Children (2014) filmindeki küçük bir rolle ve ardından Christopher Nolan'ın büyük bütçeli bilim kurgusu Interstellar (Yıldızlararası, 2014)'da Matthew McConaughey'nin karakterinin genç oğlunu oynamasıyla gerçekleşti.

Chalamet için uluslararası şöhretin kapılarını ardına kadar açan ve onu bir anda Hollywood'un en parlak genç yıldızlarından biri haline getiren yapım, 2017 tarihli Luca Guadagnino filmi Call Me by Your Name (Beni Adınla Çağır) oldu. İtalya'da geçen bu dokunaklı büyüme hikayesinde canlandırdığı 17 yaşındaki Elio Perlman karakteriyle sergilediği olağanüstü performans, ona dünya çapında övgü kazandırdı ve En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü adaylığı getirdi. Bu adaylık, onu Oscar tarihinde bu kategoride aday gösterilen en genç üçüncü isim yaptı. Aynı yıl, eleştirmenlerce beğenilen Greta Gerwig imzalı Lady Bird (Uğur Böceği) filmindeki Kyle rolüyle de başarısını pekiştirdi.

Bu hızlı yükselişin ardından Chalamet, kuşağının en yetenekli ve aranan aktörlerinden biri olarak konumunu sağlamlaştırdı. Uyuşturucu bağımlılığıyla mücadele eden bir genci canlandırdığı Beautiful Boy (2018) filmindeki performansıyla Altın Küre'ye aday gösterildi. Greta Gerwig ile Little Women (Küçük Kadınlar, 2019)'da yeniden bir araya gelerek Laurie Laurence karakterine hayat verdi. Netflix için çekilen tarihi drama The King (2019)'da İngiltere Kralı V. Henry'yi canlandırdı. Ancak onu küresel bir gişe yıldızı statüsüne taşıyan en önemli adımlardan biri, Denis Villeneuve'ün yönettiği epik bilim kurgu uyarlaması Dune oldu. Serinin ilk filmi (2021) ve devam filmi Dune: Part Two (2024)'da canlandırdığı Paul Atreides karakteriyle büyük beğeni topladı. Ayrıca, Roald Dahl'ın klasik karakterine yeni bir yorum getiren Wonka (2023) müzikalinde başrolü üstlenerek şarkı söyleme ve dans etme yeteneklerini de ortaya koydu.

Timothée Chalamet, genellikle hassas, duygusal derinliği olan ve karmaşık iç dünyalara sahip karakterleri canlandırmadaki ustalığıyla öne çıkar. Genç yaşına rağmen sergilediği olgun oyunculuk, farklı türler arasında rahatlıkla geçiş yapabilmesi ve kendine has karizmasıyla hem eleştirmenlerin hem de geniş izleyici kitlelerinin takdirini kazanmıştır. Aynı zamanda bir stil ikonu olarak da kabul edilen Chalamet, modern sinemanın en heyecan verici ve etkili genç yeteneklerinden biri olarak görülmekte ve kariyerine iddialı projelerle devam etmektedir.
data.name: Timothee Chalamet

data.biography: Timothée Hal Chalamet (Manhattan, Nova York, 27 de desembre de 1995) és un actor francoestatunidenc. Va començar a actuar en pel·lícules curtes abans d'aparèixer a la sèrie de televisió dramàtica "Homeland" el 2012.

Timothée Hal Chalamet ( 27. prosince 1995 New York, stát New York) je americko-francouzský herec. Hereckou kariéru začal rolemi v krátkých filmech, později se objevil v seriálu Ve jménu vlasti. V celovečerním filmu debutoval dramatem Muži, ženy a děti (2014) Jasona Reitmana. Objevil se také ve science-fiction Christophera Nolana Interstellar (2014).

V roce 2017 sklidil uznání za výkon v rolích ve filmech Lady Bird režisérky Grety Gerwigové, ve westernu Hostiles režiséra Scotta Coopera i za romantický film Dej mi své jméno, kterého se ujal italský režisér Luca Guadagnino. Za tento snímek byl nominován na Zlatý glóbus, BAFTA a mimo jiné také na Oscara za nejlepší mužský herecký výkon v hlavní roli.

data.biography: 出生於 1995 年 12 月 27 日的添麥菲·查洛美 (Timothée Chalamet) 是一名美國演員。由於出演了美劇《國土安全 (Homeland)》第二季中副總統的兒子 Finn Walden 而為人熟悉。之後又參演過賈森·雷特曼的《男人女人和孩子》，以及諾蘭的《星際穿越》。2017 年，他在格蕾塔·葛韋格 (Greta Gerwig) 的導演處女作《伯德小姐 (Lady Bird)》和斯科特·庫珀 (Scott Cooper) 的《敵對分子 (Hostiles)》擔任配角，因此獲得了更廣泛的認可。此外，他在盧卡·瓜達尼諾 (Luca Guadagnino) 的愛情電影《請以你的名字呼喚我 (Call Me by Your Name)》中擔任主角，這一角色為他贏得了多個獎項的最佳男演員獎提名。他是奧斯卡最佳男演員獎自 1939 年以來最年輕的提名者。在舞台上，查洛美出演了約翰·帕特里克·尚利 (John Patrick Shanley) 的自傳劇《Prodigal Son》，為此他得到了劇評聯盟傑出表演獎的提名，並獲得了 Lucille Lortel 獎的傑出首席演員獎。
data.name: 添麥菲·查洛美

Jennifer Nangle is an American actress born and raised on Boston's North Shore. She earned her B.F.A. in Theatre Studies from Niagara University in Lewiston, NY performing in many mainstage productions.  During her summers home she helped create Danvers Youth Theatre and starred in productions with all proceeds going to local charities such as H.A.W.K. and Hospice.

After realizing that chisling out her car every morning from ice and snow was getting way too chilly, Jennifer left the ice scraper behind for sunny Los Angeles, California!  She enrolled at the Laura Henry Acting Studio in Santa Monica and dedicated two years to studying the Meisner, Linklater, and Alexander techniques.

Since then she has acted and produced many different film, web, and stage productions.

data.biography: Stéphanie Sokolinski, alias Soko, is a French singer-songwriter, musician, film and television actress.

Stéphanie Sokolinski, généralement dite Soko, est une auteure-compositrice-interprète, musicienne et actrice française.

Elle sort son premier single I'll Kill Her en 2007. Il a connu un succès dans plusieurs pays européens ainsi qu’en Australie. Son premier album studio I Thought I Was an Alien est sorti en 2012 et contient le single We Might Be Dead by Tomorrow, qui a culminé à la neuvième place du Billboard Hot 100. Les années suivantes ont vu la sortie de ses deuxième et troisième albums studio My Dreams Dictate My Reality (en) (2015) et Feel Feelings (en) (2020).

En tant qu’actrice, Soko a commencé à apparaître dans un certain nombre de productions françaises au début des années 2000 et a remporté le César du meilleur espoir féminin en 2010 pour son rôle dans le film À l'origine de Xavier Giannoli (2009). Elle a remporté le Courage in Acting Award aux Women Film Critics Circle Awards et le prix de la meilleure actrice au Festival du film de Mar del Plata pour son rôle d’Augustine dans le film du même nom. Elle est ensuite apparue dans le court métrage First Kiss, qui comprenait We Might Be Dead by Tomorrow et a contribué au succès de la chanson. Son rôle de Loïe Fuller dans le film La Danseuse lui vaut d'être nommée Meilleure actrice pour le prix Lumière et meilleur espoir féminin aux César.

©Wikipedia

data.biography: Sara Paxton is an American film and television actress, model and singer, best known for playing the title role in the television series "Darcy's Wild Life" and character Sarah Borden in the show "Summerland". She also starred in feature films such as "Sleepover", "Aquamarine", "The Last House on the Left", and "Sydney White".
data.name: Sara Paxton

data.biography: Urodziła się w 1988 roku w słonecznej Kalifornii. Zajmuje się zarówno aktorstwem, jak i muzyką. Znana jest z roli w serialu "Darcy's Wild Life" oraz z filmów "Sleepover" i "Aquamarine". Jest jedynaczką i dorastała w San Fernando Valley. Gdy była mała, zaczęła występować w reklamach. Jej pierwszą rolą filmową był epizod w "Klamca, kłamca". Później pojawiała się w różnych podrzędnych filmach telewizyjnych i gościnnie grała w serialach takich, jak: "Passions" czy "Lizzie McGuire".  Większą rolę dostała w "Sleepover", a następnie główną w serialu młodzieżowym "Darcy's Wild Life". Gdy serial "Summerland" został wycofany z telewizji - zaczęła pracę nad filmem "Aquamarine" – gdzie zagrała tytułową syrenkę. Po dobrych recenzjach, posypało się wiele propozycji filmowych. Ten występ był przełomowym w jej karierze.  Sara zajmuje się też śpiewem. W 2004 roku nagrała piosenkę "Take A Walk" na ścieżkę dźwiękową do "Darcy's Wild Life" - a w 2006, "Connected" do "Aquamarine" . W 2006 roku została wydana jej debiutancka płyta "The Ups and Downs", którą promuje singiel "Here We Go Again".

Она также снималась в таких художественных фильмах, как «Ночевка», «Аквамарин», «Последний дом слева» и «Сидней Уайт».

Sara Paxton (Woodland Hills, Los Angeles, Kalifornia, 1988. április 25. –) amerikai színésznő.

A Los Angeles-i Woodland Hills-ben született, szülei egyetlen gyermekeként. Apja, Steve Paxton ír származású és távoli rokonságban áll Bill Paxton színésszel. Anyja, Lucia Mexikóban született, ezért Sara valamennyit beszél spanyolul.

Állami középiskolába járt és 2006 júniusában érettségizett le. Első filmszerepe Jim Carrey 1997-es Hanta boy című filmvígjátékának egy kisebb szerepe volt. Az 1990-es évek végén és a 2000-es évek elején további kisebb szerepekben jelent meg a televízióban. A Disney Channel egyik sikeres sorozatában, a Lizzie McGuire-ben is kapott egy epizódszerepet.

2003-ban megkapta első főszerepét a Haunted Lighthouse című rövidfilmben és megjelent a CSI: Miami helyszínelők egyik epizódjában is. Első jelentősebb szerepe 2004 júliusában az Ottalvós buli című filmvígjátékban volt, ahol az antagonista szereplő Stacyt alakította. Ugyanebben az évben nyáron szerepelt a Mindig nyár című sorozatban, mint Sarah Borden, aki több epizódban is feltűnik. Sarah Borden egy szellemileg leépült tinédzser volt, aki gyógyszereket szedett és kipróbálta a szexet Jesse McCartney-val.

Később átszerződött a Discovery Kids-hez, ott főszerepet kapott a Darcy's Wild Life című sorozatban, Darcy Fields karakterét játszotta, aki egy állatorvosnál dolgozik. A sorozatot egy farmon, Torontóban forgatták. A sorozat 2004-től 2006-ig futott. Szerepéért Daytime Emmy-díjra jelölték. 2005-ben három hónapot töltött Ausztráliában, ahol az Aquamarine című filmet forgatták, ebben egy sellőt játszott. Partnerei között volt Emma Roberts és Jojo is, akikkel összebarátkozott a forgatás alatt. A filmet 2006 márciusában mutatták be, már a nyitó hétvégén 7,5 millió dollár hasznot hozott. A filmhez készült egy dal is, a Connected, melyet Sara énekel.

Vendégszereplő volt a H2O című sorozat első részében, ennek a premierje 2006 áprilisában volt. Májusban volt egy epizódszerepe a Pepper Dennis sorozatban is. Ennek köszönhetően a Halloweentown negyedik évadjában leváltotta Kimberly J. Brownt. A szerep miatt a haját befestette barnára. 2006 nyarán kezdte forgatni a The Party Never Stops: Diary of a Binge Drinker című filmet. Itt a főiskolás Jesse-t alakítja, aki az alkohol áldozatává válik. A film 2007 márciusában jelent meg. Következő filmszerepe, Amanda Bynesszal a Sydny White című filmben volt. A forgatás 2007 februárjában kezdődött és szeptemberben ért véget. Következő filmje a Superhero!, melynek bemutatója 2008-ban volt.

2009-ben megjelent egy horrorfilmje Az utolsó ház balra, melyben egy 17 éves lányt alakít, aki borzalmas dolgokon megy keresztül családi nyaralásuk alatt.

James G. MacDonald is an American actor and director known for his extensive work in film, television, and theater spanning over 35 years. He notably portrayed Captain James Wainwright in the Star Trek: Deep Space Nine episode "Little Green Men." MacDonald has appeared alongside many high-profile actors and worked with acclaimed directors across diverse genres including comedy, drama, thriller, horror, and science fiction.

His versatile roles range from a naive young captain in Star Trek to parts in films like Volcano and Tigerland. He has also received awards for his work in theater and filmmaking. Beyond acting, MacDonald writes and directs, and he is active in teaching writing and acting workshops to incarcerated and formerly incarcerated individuals. His career is marked by both character-driven performances and creative contributions behind the scenes.

data.biography: Oona Laurence (born August 1, 2002) is an American actress who is best known for originating the role of Matilda Wormwood in Matilda on Broadway alongside Bailey Ryon, Milly Shapiro, and Sophia Gennusa. She is a New York City-based child actress with credits in film, theatre, and television. After several appearances in regional theatre productions and minor roles in short films and television episodes, in 2012, Laurence auditioned for the new musical Matilda on Broadway. Laurence landed the role of Matilda, performing in the show from March 4 to December 15, 2013. After Matilda, Laurence transitioned to film acting appearing in Tumorhead, A Little Game, The Grief of Others, I Smile Back, Damsel, Lamb, and Southpaw, portraying the daughter of Jake Gyllenhaal and Rachel McAdams' characters. She has appeared on television in Law & Order: Special Victims Unit and Orange Is the New Black. In 2015, Laurence co-starred opposite Jake Gyllenhaal and Rachel McAdams in Antoine Fuqua's Southpaw. In 2016, she co-starred as Natalie in the film Pete's Dragon, and portrayed Jane Mitchell, the daughter of Mila Kunis' character Amy Mitchell, in Bad Moms. In 2017, Laurence co-starred opposite Colin Farrell, Nicole Kidman, Kirsten Dunst, and Elle Fanning in Sofia Coppola's The Beguiled. She is the voice of Hedgehog and additional characters in the Cartoon Network series Summer Camp Island. She also performs the theme song. Laurence lives in New York City and has two younger sisters, Aimee and Jetè, who are also actresses.
data.name: Oona Laurence

奥娜·劳伦斯（Oona Laurence，2002 年 8 月 1 日出生）是一位美国女演员，她最出名的是与贝利·瑞恩、米莉·夏皮罗和索菲亚·根努萨一起在百老汇的《玛蒂尔达》中扮演玛蒂尔达·艾草一角。她是纽约市的一名童星，在电影、戏剧和电视方面都有学分。2012年，劳伦斯在百老汇的新音乐剧《玛蒂尔达》中试镜。劳伦斯在2013年3月4日至12月15日期间在该剧中饰演玛蒂尔达。在《玛蒂尔达》之后，劳伦斯转而从事电影表演，出演了《肿瘤头》、《小游戏》、《他人的悲伤》、《我微笑》、《少女》、《羔羊》和《南爪》，饰演杰克·吉伦哈尔和瑞秋·麦克亚当斯的角色的女儿。她曾在电视上出演过《法律与秩序：特殊受害者小组》和《橙色是新的黑人》。2015年，劳伦斯与杰克·吉伦哈尔和瑞秋·麦克亚当斯共同出演了安托万·福卡的《南爪》。2016年，她在电影《皮特的龙》中饰演娜塔莉，并在《坏妈妈》中饰演米拉·库尼斯饰演的角色艾米·米切尔的女儿简·米切尔。2017年，劳伦斯与科林·法瑞尔、妮可·基德曼、克尔斯滕·邓斯特和艾丽·范宁共同主演了索菲亚·科波拉的《迷惑者》。她是刺猬和卡通网络系列夏令营岛中其他角色的配音。她还演唱了主题曲。劳伦斯住在纽约市，有两个妹妹艾米和杰特，她们也是女演员。

data.biography:
Jérôme Gaspard, né le 23 septembre 1975 à Paris, est un cascadeur français.

Il commence sa carrière en 1995 par le spectacle en tant qu'acrobate. Il intègre les spectacles de Disneyland Paris en tant que cascadeur en 1997. Après quatre années partagés entre des shows lors de conventions et les spectacles du parc Disney: Pocahontas et Tarzan, il commence à effectuer des cascades au cinéma. Il double d'abord Samuel Le Bihan sur Le Pacte des loups. Il enchaîne alors les tournages entre films (Le Boulet, La Beuze...), pubs (Renault, L'Oréal, Hugo Boss…), séries TV (No Limit, Braquo…).

Il réalise en 2003 le site France-Cascade qui est un registre gratuit pour cascadeur. Ce site leur permet de mettre en ligne photos et CV et ainsi pouvoir se faire connaitre auprès des productions. En 2008, il réalise le site Action-Cascade afin de promouvoir son métier. Il y rédige des centaines d'articles sur l'univers de la cascade (conseils, histoire, retour d'expérience...).

Il intègre en 2009 le centre de formation Campus Univers Cascades en tant qu'enseignant. L'année suivante, il devient directeur pédagogique du centre chargé du suivi des élèves, du recrutement des professeurs et de l'élaboration du plan pédagogique. Il crée en 2013 la société FreeJump en association avec l'acteur Tomer Sisley. Membre du comité de direction de la Fédération des cascadeurs du cinéma français (FCFC) en 2013 et 2014, il la quitte en 2015 n'étant plus en accord avec l'évolution de cette fédération.

Source: Article "Jérôme Gaspard" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography:
Brandy Leary creates contemporary performances through the body. Active as a performer, creator, collaborator and curator in the fields of dance and circus, she is the artistic director of Anandam Dancetheatre. Her performance works have been produced and performed in Canada, Europe, India, South Africa and the United States in theatres, urban environments, festivals, museums, art galleries and isolated landscapes.

She has lived between Canada and India for the past eighteen years training, collaborating and creating (both explicitly and implicitly) in the traditional Indian performing languages of Seraikella and Mayurbhanj Chhau (dance), Kalarippayattu (martial art) and Rope Mallakhamb (aerial rope). In Canada she works with western approaches to aerial rope, post contemporary dance/circus practices and psychic/shamanistic explorations to create performances.

Brandy is a founder and Co-Director of Collective Space (an alternative performance and rehearsal venue in Toronto’s west end), founder and Co-Artistic Director of CCAFT (Contemporary Circus Arts Festival of Toronto), developer of Anandam’s Audience In Residence Program and curator/co-producer of the Body Brake series at Theatre Passe Muraille and co curator of  the new Contemporaneity series with Soraya Peerbaye.
data.name: Brandy Leary

Cassandra Magrath is an Australian actress. She played Miranda Gibson in the Australian ABC 1998–2000 television series SeaChange and Liz Hunter in the 2005 Australian horror film Wolf Creek.

Magrath began her acting career aged 11, with a role in the children's television programme Ocean Girl. She also played Charlene in the Australian ABC children's television series The Wayne Manifesto that aired in 1996.

Magrath also acted as Alison Pi Renfrey in The Crash Zone in 1998. She also appears in The Butterfly Effect video 'Gone', as well as comedy trio Tripod's 'Xbox Song'. Magrath stars in the Michael Adante thriller Vanished in which she portrayed Winona Grant. In 2016 she starred in Screen Australia's horror film Scare Campaign, directed by the Cairnes brothers (100 Bloody Acres).

data.overview: Thời Đại Lập Nghiệp xoay quanh một kỹ sư phần mềm là Quách Hâm Niên (do Hoàng Hiên thủ vai). Anh đã quyết tâm tạo ra một phần mềm thông tin điện thoại mới có thể dùng giọng nói để nhắn tin tới người khác. Để có được sự ủng hộ của nhà đầu tư và bạn bè, anh phải trải qua quá trình nghiên cứu phát minh gian khổ vô cùng, Cuối cùng thì anh cũng có thể thực hiện ước mơ của mình, anh đặt tên nó là chiếc hộp ma thuật và gặt hái được thành công to lớn. Đồng thời, anh cũng nảy sinh cảm tình với nhà đầu tư phân tích là Na Lam. Tuy nhiên con đường xây dựng sự nghiệp của anh không hề thuận buồm xuôi gió như anh nghĩ. Vì vậy mà anh đã phải trải qua rất nhiều trắc trở mới có thể làm cho kỹ thuật phát triển được. Trong giai đoạn khó khăn đó, anh đã nhận được tình yêu của Na Lam cũng như sự ủng hộ của cô. Cả hai đã cùng nhau kề vai sát cách trên con đường xây dựng sự nghiệp.

James Patrick Buckley (born 14 August 1987, Croydon, England) is an English stand-up comedian, actor, musician and YouTuber. He is known for playing Jay Cartwright in the BAFTA-winning E4 sitcom The Inbetweeners.

Buckley was born in Croydon, where he attended Thornton School. It was here, while taking part in school plays, that Buckley found out how much he enjoyed performing and, from the age of seven, started going to a stage school at the weekends. At age 11, Buckley began his first professional jobs in the West End shows Whistle Down the Wind and Les Misérables. At 11 years old he also began attending The Chafford School. Buckley says that school interested him so little that he did not collect his GCSE results.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

data.biography:
Lâm Thanh Mỹ là diễn viên nhí được khán giả biết đến rộng rãi qua vai Mận trong bộ phim Tôi Thấy Hoa Vàng Trên Cỏ Xanh. Khi đảm nhận vai diễn này, cô mới chỉ 10 tuổi, nhưng với khả năng diễn xuất tự nhiên và cảm xúc, Thanh Mỹ đã nhanh chóng chiếm được cảm tình của công chúng.

Dù còn nhỏ tuổi, cô đã góp mặt trong nhiều bộ phim khiến nhiều người bất ngờ về sự chăm chỉ và năng khiếu nghệ thuật của mình. Song song với việc đóng phim, Thanh Mỹ vẫn luôn chú trọng việc học, điều này càng khiến cô được khán giả yêu mến hơn.

Gần đây, nữ diễn viên nhí gây chú ý khi đăng tải những hình ảnh xinh đẹp ở tuổi 16, khiến cộng đồng mạng trầm trồ trước vẻ ngoài ngày càng trưởng thành.

Sinh ra trong một gia đình không có truyền thống nghệ thuật, Lâm Thanh Mỹ đến với diễn xuất khá tình cờ — cô bắt đầu đóng quảng cáo sau khi được mẹ dắt đi casting và may mắn được chọn, mở ra con đường nghệ thuật từ rất sớm.
data.name: Lam Thanh My

Nadia de Santiago (3 de enero de 1990) es una actriz española conocida tanto por su papel en Las 13 rosas como por el de Asunción Muñoz en Amar en tiempos revueltos y su secuela, Amar es para siempre.

La joven actriz ha participado en multitud de series y algunas películas. En sus comienzos, presentó programas infantiles tales como Aquatrix (1999) y El Submarino Azul (2000). En los últimos años ha participado en películas como Alatriste, de Agustín Díaz Yanes o Las 13 rosas, de Emilio Martínez Lázaro con la que consiguió una nominación en los Premios Goya y otra en la Unión de Actores.

Robert Conrad (born Conrad Robert Norton Falk; March 1, 1935 - February 8, 2020) was an American film and television actor, singer, and stuntman.

Conrad is most remembered for his role in the 1965–69 television series The Wild Wild West, playing Secret Service agent James T. West. He portrayed World War II ace Pappy Boyington in the television series Baa Baa Black Sheep (later syndicated as Black Sheep Squadron). In addition to acting, he was a singer, and recorded several pop/rock songs in the late 1950s and early 1960s as Bob Conrad.

Conrad hosted a weekly two-hour national radio show (The PM Show with Robert Conrad) on CRN Digital Talk Radio during his latter years, beginning in 2008.
data.name: Robert Conrad

data.biography:
Conrad Robert Falk, dit Robert Conrad, est un acteur, cascadeur et chanteur américain né le 1er mars 1935 à Chicago1 et mort le 8 février 2020 à Malibu en Californie.

Il est principalement connu pour ses rôles de James T. West dans la série télévisée Les Mystères de l'Ouest (The Wild Wild West) de 1965 à 1969, et du major Greg « Pappy » Boyington dans la série Les Têtes brûlées (Baa Baa Black Sheep) de 1976 à 1978.

Robert Conrad, nascut Conrad Robert Falkowsky (Chicago, Illinois, 1 de març de 1935 - Malibu, 8 de febrer de 2020) fou un actor de televisió, cinema, cantant i director (retirat) estatunidenc. Va ser famós per interpretar el paper en televisió de Jim West en la sèrie de culte The Wild Wild West.
